title: Japanese-Style Semolina Casserole
description: A fusion of Japanese and Italian flavors in a delicious casserole. Chewy semolina pasta is paired with zesty sauce and a hint of Brazilian spices.
instructions: Cook semolina pasta according to package instructions.
In a pan, heat the zesty sauce over medium heat.
Add Brazilian spice blend to the sauce and stir well.
Combine cooked pasta, sauce, and green onions in a bowl.
Transfer the mixture to a casserole dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
